keywords: delivery gate SUBMITTED status escrow release LIFO compensation REFUND_MILESTONE RESTORE_GIG_STATUS milestone granularity timer auto-release FREEDOM config MilestoneReleased MilestoneDisputed EscrowCompensationStarted no deleteDocument
teachingPoint: T615 DeliveryGateEscrowController enforces delivery gate BEFORE escrow release: delivery.status must be SUBMITTED or release is rejected. Dispute path sets status=DISPUTED with no fund movement — audit + MilestoneDisputed only. LIFO compensation chain is registered as [REFUND_MILESTONE, RESTORE_GIG_STATUS] but executed in reverse as [RESTORE_GIG_STATUS, REFUND_MILESTONE]. Auto-release timer days come from FREEDOM config — never hardcoded. deleteDocument is NEVER called on any milestone.
ironRules: releaseEscrow: delivery.status must equal 'SUBMITTED' — any other status returns DELIVERY_NOT_SUBMITTED with no milestone state change
Dispute path: storeDocument(MILESTONES_INDEX, status=DISPUTED) + audit + MilestoneDisputed — no fund movement, no deleteDocument
LIFO chain constant: ESCROW_COMPENSATION_CHAIN = ['REFUND_MILESTONE','RESTORE_GIG_STATUS'] as const — executed via [...chain].reverse()
Auto-release timer days MUST be read from FREEDOM config (getConfig) — never hardcoded as a literal integer
deleteDocument is prohibited on any milestone record — status transitions only (RELEASED or DISPUTED)
